genre_assessment: Primary genre: Hidden Identity Revenge Romance. Secondary stack: power-couple intrigue, public humiliation payoff, corporate legitimacy war.
tone: Sharp, glamorous, humiliating, addictive, romantic under pressure.
worldbuilding_seeds: Old-money family empire with a decaying legitimacy core
Elite public spaces where humiliation is always witnessed
A boardroom system that values evidence, perception and money over sentiment
timeline_seeds: Five years ago: the real heiress disappears after a staged accident
Two years ago: Celia consolidates social legitimacy as acting heiress
Present day: Nora returns under an alias as a public-facing revenge strategist

location_candidates.name: Hale Charity Gala Ballroom
location_candidates.dramatic_function: public humiliation arena and return stage
location_candidates.visual_seed: crystal light, black marble, old-money coldness

location_candidates.name: Auction Floor
location_candidates.visual_seed: velvet display, donor tables, spotlight pressure

prop_candidates.name: Amelia Hale Seal
prop_candidates.story_function: proof of true lineage and evidence trigger
prop_candidates.visual_seed: aged metal, engraved crest, velvet case

prop_candidates.name: Forged Donor Ledger
prop_candidates.visual_seed: cream paper, wet signature, gold-edged pages

character_cards.name: Nora Hale / Eva Stone
character_cards.public_identity: Auction consultant freshly back from London
character_cards.hidden_identity: The real Hale heiress presumed dead
character_cards.core_desire: Reclaim the company and destroy the lie in public
character_cards.leverage: lineage knowledge, hidden evidence, control under pressure

character_cards.name: Adrian Vale
character_cards.hidden_identity: He is tracing the fraud network behind the Hale board
character_cards.core_desire: Own the truth before anyone else weaponizes it

character_cards.name: Celia Hale
character_cards.public_identity: Beloved acting heiress and social darling
character_cards.hidden_identity: Usurper whose status rests on forged legitimacy
character_cards.core_desire: Lock permanent control over the Hale empire
character_cards.leverage: public image, family loyalty theater, insiders

relationship_map.dynamic: blood rivalry, stolen identity, public war

conflict_map.label: inheritance war
conflict_map.description: The real heiress returns in secret to reclaim the empire from the false successor.

conflict_map.label: public legitimacy battle
conflict_map.description: Every major confrontation happens in rooms full of witnesses.

conflict_map.label: alliance under suspicion
conflict_map.description: Nora and Adrian need each other while hiding separate agendas.

selling_points: dead heiress returns under a false name
public revenge at elite social events
boardroom legitimacy war instead of household melodrama
similarity_risks: Direct reuse of the family-gala return scene
Direct reuse of the forged-signature auction reveal
Direct reuse of the original private betrayal dialogue beat
source_value_assessment: High adaptation value. The source contains a clear identity engine, public humiliation potential, and a romance-capable power ally.
supporting_evidence: Chapter 1 establishes the false-death return engine
Chapter 2 contains a public evidence drop structure
The romanceable ally enters early enough for short-drama pacing
